tracks.meaning: the inner surface of the hand between the wrist and the base of the fingers
the large compound leaf of a palm tree with many leaflets arranged like fingers
to conceal something in the palm of the hand, typically a small object or playing card
to manipulate cards by concealing them in the palm during magic tricks or card games
the amount that can be held in the palm of the hand, used as a measure of quantity
a handheld computer device, especially the PalmPilot personal digital assistant
to strike someone on the hand with a cane or rod as a form of corporal punishment
